home.title: Vite React TypeScript
home.subtitle: Modern Starter Template
home.description: A production-ready starter with TypeScript, React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, i18n, Socket.io, and Zustand — all pre-configured and ready to go.

performance.title: High Performance
performance.description: Lightning-fast HMR and optimized build process powered by Vite for the best developer experience.

routing.title: Client-Side Routing
routing.description: React Router 7 with full type safety and seamless navigation between pages.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Multi-language support with i18next and browser-based language detection.

theme.title: Theme System
theme.description: Dark/Light theme with Zustand persistence and Tailwind CSS 4 integration.

socket.title: Socket.io
socket.description: Real-time bidirectional event-based communication with automatic reconnection support.

state.title: State Management
state.description: Zustand stores with persist middleware for theme, auth, and socket state management.

about.title: About This Project
about.description: This is a demonstration template showcasing how to build a full-featured Vite + React application.
about.architecture_desc: The application is built on top of Vite's fast development server. It utilizes a modular component architecture with centralized state management and real-time capabilities, ensuring a smooth and interactive user experience.

socket.title: Socket.io Connection Demo
socket.description: Real-time connection status and player count synchronization.
socket.feature_realtime_desc: Bidirectional event-based communication between client and server with automatic reconnection support.
socket.feature_websocket_desc: Efficient full-duplex communication over a single TCP connection with minimal latency overhead.
socket.feature_scalable_desc: Built-in support for channel-based broadcasting, rooms, namespaces, and horizontal scaling with adapters.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Test your server authentication flow — login with email/password or Google OAuth, check auth status, and sign out.
auth.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.name: Name
auth.delete_account_confirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

threejs.title: Three.js Interactive Scene
threejs.description: Interactive 3D graphics powered by Three.js with React-three-fiber — explore geometric shapes and real-time rendering.
threejs.feature_renderer_desc: Hardware-accelerated 3D rendering using WebGL for high-performance graphics across all modern browsers.
threejs.feature_interaction_desc: Orbit controls allow you to rotate, pan, and zoom around the 3D scene with intuitive mouse and touch gestures.
threejs.feature_shapes_desc: Various 3D shapes with different materials, colors, and real-time animations rendered in a unified scene.

error.notFound: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

notfound.title: Page Not Found
notfound.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
